name: Paint XP

notes.en: Left click/tap draws with the foreground color; right click (or long-press a swatch) sets/uses the background color. Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y undo/redo.
notes.ru: Левая кнопка/тап рисует основным цветом; правая кнопка (или долгое нажатие на образец) задаёт/использует фоновый цвет. Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y — отмена/повтор.

notes: Deliberate style exception for this hub: a skeuomorphic Windows XP 'Luna' MS-Paint clone, not the usual neon-vector look. System font stack only (Tahoma/Segoe UI/Verdana) — no bundled or fetched webfont. Pencil is plotted pixel-by-pixel (Bresenham) for a true hard, non-anti-aliased edge; every other tool uses normal canvas 2D stroking. Left-click/primary-touch draws with the foreground color, right-click/long-press draws with the background color, exactly like classic Paint.
